display.purpose: Page titles, portfolio totals, insight health scores.

body.purpose: Default UI copy; report prose capped at 65ch.

data.purpose: Prices, P&L, shares — always tabular mono.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default color and border transitions on buttons and nav.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard human-initiated action — New Run, Save, empty-state CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #1d4ed8; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1e40af; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: AI Generate Button
components.description: AI-powered flows only — generate insight, batch analyze.
components.css: .ds-btn-ai { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #7e22ce; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ai:hover { background: #6b21a8; } .ds-btn-ai:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a855f7; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default form field on surface panels.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(37 99 235 / 0.25); }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Default content panel on page canvas.
components.html:
Portfolio Holdings

12 positions · updated 2m ago
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 0.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; }

components.name: Verdict Badge Buy
components.description: BUY verdict — financial semantic green only.
components.css: .ds-verdict { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-verdict-buy { background: rgb(20 83 45 / 0.4); color: #4ade80; }

components.name: Nav Link Active
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #475569; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 0.125rem; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1e293b; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #2563eb; border-bottom-color: #2563eb; }

components.name: Empty State CTA
components.description: Centered empty panel with icon well and primary action.
components.html:
+

No runs yet

Launch your first analysis to see verdicts here.
components.css: .ds-empty { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #ffffff; } .ds-empty-icon { width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f8fafc; color: #475569; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-empty-title { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #0f172a; } .ds-empty-desc { margin: 0.25rem 0 1rem; max-width: 20rem; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; }

narrative.overview: AgentFloor should feel like opening a well-designed consumer fintech app at the start of the trading day: calm, scannable, and confident. The visual system serves research workflows — portfolio holdings, AI briefings, run verdicts — not marketing spectacle. Surfaces are organized in clear tonal steps so dense data remains readable without legacy enterprise gray-box fatigue.
keyCharacteristics: Morning-first hierarchy — portfolio and briefing surfaces lead
Semantic color discipline — blue actions, purple AI, green/red/yellow verdicts only
Soft consumer fintech touch — 8–12px radius, comfortable padding
Data legibility — Geist Mono tabular nums for financial figures

rules.name: The Two-Lane Rule
rules.body: Blue is for human navigation and standard actions. Purple is for AI generation. Do not cross these lanes.

rules.name: The Verdict-Only Rule
rules.body: Green, red, and yellow carry financial meaning only. Never use them for generic status.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: All numeric financial data uses Geist Mono with tabular figures.

rules.name: The Muted-Body Ban
rules.body: Muted text is for captions and metadata only, not body paragraphs.

rules.name: The Flat-Panel Rule
rules.body: Holdings rows and insight panels use border + background step, not drop shadows at rest.

dos: Do use semantic tokens (bg-surface, text-fg, border-border) over raw Tailwind palette classes in new code.
Do keep the morning portfolio check scannable — stats bar, health score, and action items above the fold.
Do reserve purple for AI-powered flows.
Do use Geist Mono + tabular nums for all financial figures.
Do support both light and dark with paired token values.
Do use portals or fixed positioning for dropdowns inside scrollable tables.
donts: Don't build legacy enterprise admin panels — gray boxes, cramped tables, tiny type, 2005-era density.
Don't use gamified trading patterns — streaks, confetti, casino energy.
Don't apply generic AI slop — purple gradient chrome everywhere, chatbot-first layouts.
Don't use crypto meme aesthetics — neon gradients, rocket emojis, hype CTAs.
Don't use green/red/yellow for non-financial status.
Don't add colored left-border stripes on cards as accent decoration.
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism inside the app shell.
